title: ItemRenderTweaks
description: Client sided QOL/util mod that allows the user to make certain items glow and/or change size.
body:
# Features Allows you to enter in certain items/blocks to make them
**static glow
RGB glow (change speed)
change size** ![Big Items Glowing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hn4TemV7/images/0ba2ae79d2212317c6b670c0ecef4a216cbd1add.png) ![Mod config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hn4TemV7/images/69436720c34eebe6766add3c894ed707bf82a74d.png)
